---
title: "Human Geography"
subtitle: "The study of human societies, cultures, settlements, and their interaction with the environment."
author: "Geography Team"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
---

{{< include human-geography/00-syllabus.md >}}

---

Welcome to the **Human Geography** module of Geography OpenCourseWare.

---

## Part A: Common Topics (NEP-2020 & UGC NET)

These topics are covered in both the NEP-2020 undergraduate syllabus and the UGC NET syllabus.

{{< include human-geography/01-nature-and-scope.md >}}

{{< include human-geography/02-man-environment-relationship.md >}}

{{< include human-geography/03-race-religion-language.md >}}

{{< include human-geography/04-rural-settlements.md >}}

{{< include human-geography/05-urban-settlements.md >}}

---

## Part B: NEP-2020 Specific Topics

These topics are part of the NEP-2020 undergraduate programme only.

{{< include human-geography/06-cultural-globalization-diversity.md >}}

---

## Part C: UGC NET Specific Topics

These topics are part of the UGC NET syllabus only.

{{< include human-geography/07-urban-morphology.md >}}

{{< include human-geography/08-central-place-theory.md >}}

---


---

## Quick Reference

{{< include human-geography/09-quick-reference.md >}}

---
